name: bug-fix-loop
description: Reproduce, diagnose, fix, and verify a bug — looping until it provably stays fixed.
rules: one writer per artifact — two seats never edit the same .solo/ file or code area in the same stage
context is explicit — each seat reads only its listed files, plus .solo/handoff.md
every seat ends with a handoff checked by /ai:handoff-check before the next stage starts
route models with /ai:compare-models; audit generated code with /ai:review-output
no evidence, no finding — audits follow the evidence-based output format

seats.deliverable: Root cause + minimal fix; cause logged to decisions, status updated in bugs
Regression test that fails before / passes after, repro no longer reproduces

exit_criteria: Bug closed in .solo/bugs.md with a regression test in .solo/tests.md and gate GO

loop.until: verifier reports PASS and the original repro fails to reproduce
loop.on_third_failure: stop and run /ai:repair-cycle on the fixer's prompt before continuing
